name: Millennium Police
short_description: This is a third person shooter FPS game with dream scenes. Players play as 90s police officers searching for evidence on the map to solve puzzles, and can also shoot and eliminate monsters. Players can wander in a bizarre world to find inspiration.
detailed_description:
This is a third person shooter FPS game with dream scenes, where players take on the role of a 90s police officer searching for evidence on the map to solve puzzles and eliminate monsters.

In the game, players can shoot and eliminate monsters, and wander in a bizarre world to find inspiration. The game has six different scenes and over ten different types of monsters.

Keyboard WASD moves, spacebar jumps, keyboard F turns on lights, keyboard Q changes handguns, keyboard C crouches down, keyboard E picks up evidence, left mouse button shoots, right mouse button aims.

supported_languages: English, French, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
